MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF SIBELL,FAY,TRUSTEE FOR HERMAN SIBELL MARITAL TRUST SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR JAN-05-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 01 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON JAN-12-1994 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT WAS REACHED BY STIPULATION. PLAINTIFF SHALL RECEIVE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF 355 ELLIS STREET, #14, SAN FRANCISCO. RENT AND DAMAGES OF, $2,907 SHALL BE AWARDED PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT DANIEL ANDERSON SHALL VACATE THE PREMISES AT 355 ELLIS, #14 BY 1-31-94. THE PREMISES SHALL BE LEFT IN A CLEAN CONDITION. IF DEFENDANT, DANIEL ANDERSON VACATES BY 1-31-94, THE JUDGMENT SHALL BE VACATED. THE LANDLORD SHALL KEEP THE THE SECURITY DEPOSIT. THERE WILL BE A PRE-POSTING OF THE PROPERTY AT 355 ELLIS STREET, #14. EACH SIDE SHALL BEAR THEIR OWN ATTORNEYS FEES AND COSTS. IF DEFENDANT DOES NOT VACATE BY 1-31-94, A WRIT OF POSSESSION SHALL ISSUE 2-1-94.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ANDERSON, DANIEL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 355 ELLIS ST, #14, S.F, CA., STAYED UNTIL JAN-31-1994, PL. TO RETAIN ANY DEPOSITS IN HIS POSSESSION. IF DEF. VACATE PREMISES BY 1-31-94, RETURNS KEYS & LEAVES IN BROOM CLEAN CONDITION, PL. WILL S/A JUDGMENT & DISM.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
ORDER TO SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT AND THE ACTION DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. JUDGMENT OF JAN-21-1994 SET ASIDE
